title: Spicy Paneer Energy Balls
description: A delicious and healthy Indian-inspired dinner recipe made with paneer, perfect for a quick meal or snack.
instructions: 1. In a large mixing bowl, combine crumbly paneer, chopped chilies, oats, honey, lemon juice, and salt. Mix well.
2. Add ghee to the mixture and mix until it forms a dough.
3. Knead the dough for 2-3 minutes until it becomes smooth.
4. Divide the dough into small balls, about 1-inch in diameter.
5. Roll each ball between your palms to shape into smooth energy balls.
6. Place the energy balls on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
7. Refrigerate the energy balls for at least 30 minutes to set.
8. Serve chilled, or store in an airtight container for up to 5 days.
